knowledge.insight: Johnston: The key to tournament success in Canada was figuring out smallmouth on inland lakes that had been dominated by largemouth. When zebra mussels and gobies began impacting lakes, thinking outside the box and expanding beyond traditional flipping mats, docks and milfoil was critical.
Johnston: Having a sibling rivalry with brother Chris pushes both to be better. They help each other out, which is especially advantageous during practice.
Johnston: Without a doubt, my goal is to win the AOY Title.
